clauses.obligation: Open by Required Opening Date (typically 15 months from Effective Date)
clauses.consequence: Termination if not opened by Required Opening Date

clauses.obligation: Remodel at 10 years after Opening Date per then-current standards
Refurbish at 5 years and 15 years after Opening Date
CFF as specified in Contract Data Schedule (standard 5.9%)
CAF at 5.0% of Gross Sales (fixed in agreement)
Use only designated marks in approved manner; no sublicensing; no internet use without approval; no use as corporate name
clauses.restriction: All goodwill accrues to franchisor/IP affiliate

clauses.obligation: Maintain absolute confidentiality during and after term; adopt franchisor-specified security procedures
All innovations are franchisor's property (work made for hire); must assign if not qualifying
Continuously maintain Restaurant and Premises per Standards; ongoing repairs and replacements
CGL $2M per occurrence, EPL $1M, all-risk property, workers comp, other per Standards
clauses.requirement: Franchisor and affiliates as additional insureds
clauses.consequence: Franchisor may obtain coverage at franchisee expense

clauses.obligation: Defend, indemnify, hold harmless franchisor from all claims related to restaurant development/operation
clauses.carveout: If franchisor assumes defense of class action or brand-impact claim, franchisor bears its own costs

clauses.obligation: Franchisor may assign without restriction; no further obligation upon transfer except accrued liabilities

clauses.restriction: No transfer without prior written approval; transfer without approval is breach with no effect

clauses.note: State law longer cure period applies if applicable

rights: Enter restaurant if health/safety threat without trespass liability
Enter and correct condition after 30-day non-compliance
Disapprove participation in new products/programs for repeated defaults

clauses.obligation: Pay all costs, payroll, travel, attorneys' fees for successful enforcement
Franchisee agrees not to contest appropriateness of injunctive relief for Standards breach

clauses.restriction: No liability for franchisor's directors, officers, employees, affiliates, attorneys

clauses.scope: Applies to franchises in CA, HI, IL, IN, MD, MI, MN, NY, ND, RI, SD, VA, WA, WI
clauses.effect: No statement/questionnaire can waive franchise law claims or disclaim reliance
